sample_commentary:
FORECAST — Q2 2026 Revenue: $366.7M – $373.5M (base case $370.1M)

Drivers:
- Trailing growth trend: 24.5% YoY -> CONFIRMED (filed, Income statement + 2026 guidance, 6-K filings)
- Guidance midpoint: 19.5% YoY -> CONFIRMED (company guidance)
- NDR spread (enterprise 115% vs overall 110%) nudges growth up 0.75pp -> HYPOTHESIS (assumes enterprise mix-shift continues; no quarter-specific guidance on this)

OPEN ITEMS:
- Q2 2025 and Q3 2025 revenue not in the extracted data set — trailing average uses only 2 of 4 trailing quarters. Flagged as a data gap, not papered over.
- FX headwind (100-200 bps per FY2026 guidance) not decomposed into revenue vs. margin impact — flagged for analyst review before this forecast is used externally.
